title: Citrusy Dutch Rice Wine Pilaf
description: A citrusy and snappy Dutch dish featuring rice wine, great for a low-fat-friendly midnight craving.

ingredients.name: chopped fresh herbs (such as parsley or dill)

instructions: Heat the chicken broth in a saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add the rice wine and orange juice to the broth, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and cover the saucepan with a tight-fitting lid.
Simmer for 18 minutes, or until the liquid has been absorbed and the rice is tender.
Fluff the rice with a fork and stir in the grated ginger, sugar, salt, and black pepper.
Transfer the rice to a serving dish and garnish with chopped fresh herbs.
